nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=210 beats='Priya Anand arrives as new keeper of the Coolant Archive above Kestrel Station on the shift the reactor seal fails quietly and the oldest vaults begin to drink the venting gas, and four ways to meet the drowning open before her'>>

choices.label: Investigate the manifest of the flooding lower bays.
Seek out Tomas Reyes, the last living technician.
Face the venting leak against the hull.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='Priya Anand turns toward the manifest of the flooding lower bays; salt damp beads on the stone and her lantern doubles in the venting gas; a first wrongness snags her'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=186 beats='the manifest of the flooding lower bays offers Priya Anand two ways in: press hard and risk being noticed by whatever the venting gas answers to, or wait and let the Coolant Archive keep its secret a while longer'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='pressed directly, the manifest of the flooding lower bays yields a hard specific fact that will not sit still in Priya Anand's mind and points deeper under the tideline'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=181 beats='watching the manifest of the flooding lower bays from the edge, Priya Anand can fold the quiet detail into what she knows, or let the cold and the late hour pull her attention away before she has understood it'>>

choices.label: Hold the thread and go on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=169 beats='both readings of the manifest of the flooding lower bays settle on the same small impossibility, and Priya Anand feels the flooded floor tilt the whole building toward one question'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='Priya Anand goes down after the manifest of the flooding lower bays, the venting gas climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='Priya Anand goes down after the manifest of the flooding lower bays, the venting gas climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='Priya Anand goes down after the manifest of the flooding lower bays, the venting gas climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='the manifest of the flooding lower bays shows Priya Anand a name half dissolved in brine; she can carry the reading down toward Aldous Rook's old pivot, or stop to record only the loss in front of her'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='carrying what the manifest of the flooding lower bays has told her, Priya Anand reaches the low landing toward the shared question the Coolant Archive seems built around: why the leak takes what it takes'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=156 beats='the pull of the manifest of the flooding lower bays closes over Priya Anand before she can hold it; she surfaces later on dry stone, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood, the venting gas already higher'>>

ending.title: Lost the Thread at The Flooding Bays

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=159 beats='Priya Anand stays to record only the manifest of the flooding lower bays and the loss it marks; she leaves the deeper question unasked and learns one true small thing about how Kestrel Station forgets'>>

ending.title: A Note on The Flooding Bays

ending.title: A Note on The Venting Leak

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=196 beats='every approach converges here: the leak does not rise blindly but climbs toward particular shelves, taking first the records Kestrel Station most wanted gone, and Priya Anand finally sees the pattern in the ruin'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=187 beats='the venting gas reads the Coolant Archive like an index of shame, and Priya Anand understands the flood is a choosing; she must decide how to test the choosing before it reaches the middle vaults'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='four threads lead deeper from the choosing the leak: the voided marriage contracts, Tomas Reyes's withheld logs, the struck crew manifests, and the erased birth registry'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=177 beats='Priya Anand wades to the voided marriage contracts, where The Vows the Station Forgot lies swelling in its boxes; the ink lifts off the page and rearranges as she watches'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='reading the voided marriage contracts line by drowned line, Priya Anand copies the venting gas revisions into her book while the boxes sag and the leak keeps its patient climb'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='reading the voided marriage contracts line by drowned line, Priya Anand copies the venting gas revisions into her book while the boxes sag and the leak keeps its patient climb'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=183 beats='the voided marriage contracts can be read as the venting gas leaves it, changed, or dried and forced back to what it first said; each choice costs Priya Anand something of the truth'>>

choices.label: Dry it and force it back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='the revision of the voided marriage contracts proves more honest than the original, and the discovery pulls Priya Anand toward the second pivot'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='the voided marriage contracts names a thing the Coolant Archive was never meant to shelve; Priya Anand can carry the contradiction toward what the building truly holds, or seal this vault and save only itself'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='with the voided marriage contracts rewritten in her hands, Priya Anand climbs toward the second question under all the others: what the Coolant Archive was actually built to hold'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=157 beats='Priya Anand dries the voided marriage contracts and forces the ink back to its first lie; the page holds, but she has helped Kestrel Station forget again, and the venting gas only climbs faster'>>

ending.title: Forced Back: The Vows the Station Forgot

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=160 beats='Priya Anand seals the vault around the voided marriage contracts and saves the room if not the meaning; she keeps a true thing safe and leaves its harder truth unspoken'>>

ending.title: Sealed Around A Contract Kept Silent But Whole

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=200 beats='the four threads reconverge and answer together: the Coolant Archive was never built to keep Kestrel Station's records but to hold everything Kestrel Station chose to forget, a covenant with its own unremembering, and the venting gas has come to call the covenant in'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=188 beats='Aldous Rook did not build a library, Priya Anand realises, but a lung for Kestrel Station's shame, breathing what could not be said; the leak is Kestrel Station's own held breath let go at last'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='three ways remain to test the covenant before it drowns: the engineer's folded confession, Tomas Reyes at his console, and the leak's own record against the hull'>>

choices.label: Sit with Tomas Reyes at his console.
Read the leak's own record against the hull.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='Priya Anand comes to the engineer's folded confession; What the Engineer Left Unsaid waits like held weather, and the salt light off the venting gas makes the room feel underwater already'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='Priya Anand trades honesty for honesty with the engineer's folded confession, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of What the Engineer Left Unsaid, the venting gas rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='Priya Anand trades honesty for honesty with the engineer's folded confession, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of What the Engineer Left Unsaid, the venting gas rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='Priya Anand trades honesty for honesty with the engineer's folded confession, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of What the Engineer Left Unsaid, the venting gas rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='the engineer's folded confession will answer Priya Anand honestly only if she gives something true in return; she can offer her own doubt, or keep her distance and take only what is freely shown'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='in exchange, the engineer's folded confession gives Priya Anand the last turn of the story, and it points at a document with her own name where no name of hers should be'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=177 beats='the engineer's folded confession sets the impossible page before Priya Anand; she can carry it to the third pivot and face it, or refuse the page and keep the version of herself she arrived with'>>

choices.label: Carry the page to the pivot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='with what the engineer's folded confession has given her, Priya Anand climbs to the last turn, where the Coolant Archive stops being about Kestrel Station and becomes about the keeper who came to save it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='Priya Anand keeps her distance from the engineer's folded confession and takes only what is safe to take; she leaves with facts and without the truth, dry and unchanged and a little ashamed'>>

ending.title: Kept Distance: What the Engineer Left Unsaid

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=161 beats='Priya Anand refuses the page the engineer's folded confession offers and stays the woman she was; she preserves her own settled story and never learns what the Coolant Archive wrote in her name'>>

ending.title: Refused the Page: What the Engineer Left Unsaid

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=202 beats='all three threads meet on one impossible sheet: Priya Anand's own name, in her own hand, signing an entry dated before she was ever hired, as though the Coolant Archive had been waiting for a keeper it already knew'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=189 beats='the entry records a promise: that the last keeper would decide what Kestrel Station is allowed to remember, and Priya Anand sees the flood has only ever been asking her to choose'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=185 beats='she reads her own signed words to their end while the venting gas laps the top step, and the whole of Kestrel Station's memory now waits on what she does before dawn'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=192 beats='four ways to answer the Coolant Archive's drowning lie open, and each keeps a different thing: Kestrel Station made whole, one saved treasure, peace with what cannot be kept, or the honest small salvage of a losing night'>>

choices.label: Begin reconciling Kestrel Station with its forgetting.
Begin saving the one irreplaceable log of Kestrel Station.
Begin making peace with what the leak will take.
Begin salvaging a single log from a losing shift.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='Priya Anand commits to reconciling Kestrel Station with its forgetting and starts down into the flooding stair, the venting gas black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='Priya Anand commits to reconciling Kestrel Station with its forgetting and starts down into the flooding stair, the venting gas black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark'>>
